full_description_text: We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to join our platform team. You will design and implement scalable microservices using Python and FastAPI, deploy applications with Docker and Kubernetes on AWS infrastructure. Experience with React for frontend development is a plus.

Join our ML team to build and deploy machine learning models at scale. You'll work with Python, TensorFlow, and scikit-learn to develop predictive models. Experience with MLOps practices and Apache Airflow is highly valued.

Looking for a DevOps Engineer to manage our cloud infrastructure. You will automate deployments using Kubernetes, Docker, and Terraform on AWS. Experience with monitoring tools like Prometheus and Grafana is preferred.

We need a Senior Product Manager to drive product strategy and roadmap. You'll work with cross-functional teams using Agile methodologies, analyze user data, and make data-driven decisions. SQL and Tableau experience is a plus.

Full Stack Developer position working on modern web applications. You'll build responsive frontends with React and scalable backends with Node.js and MongoDB. TypeScript and GraphQL knowledge is beneficial.
